comment.body:
remember what i wrote? 
if vol catches up, no upside. it catcehd up as many of you recognized instantly.
now imagine that the speed is so steep towards 6100 that it ate up all that vol, and reflexively printed into realiezd vol too.
this is why it was important.
if somebody played short vol trade today, printed.
(as said earlier I don't post those trades bcs many can't follow those ones, and those tactics are  very complex)

comment.body: So to sum up today we opened in positive speed which had negative charm effects above spot, vol (vega) was high so naturally price reversed out of the area due to the positive speed? When we started encroaching in lower territory vega started to dry up because of the - speed effect which would be postive gamma? the largest node we had for the day on the downside and then the reversal came. (am i wrong here or misinterpreting it?) sorry if it sounds choppy i am still learning and trying to digest it
